concerns.analysis: The image manifest indicates that multiple meaningful images from the source PDF, including the DEQ logo on page 1 and several mathematical equations (such as Eq. 1 and Eq. 2 on page 23, Eq. 4 on page 27, and Eq. 5 on page 27), have invalid/corrupted base64 data ('valid': false). Consequently, these images will not render in the browser. Furthermore, the North Carolina state seal on page 1 is missing entirely as an image element and is instead rendered as plain text bracketed like '[Image: Seal
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 1 shows the North Carolina state seal and the DEQ logo. Page 23 shows mathematical formulas for Equation 1 and Equation 2.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML output includes image tags for the DEQ logo and equations but with corrupted base64 data that will fail to render ('valid': false). The state seal is missing an element completely and appears as '[Image: Seal of the State of North Carolina]'.
concerns.location: Page 1, Page 23, and various pages with equations

concerns.description: Fidelity Content evaluation failed — dimension not assessed, requires human review
concerns.analysis: The content fidelity call did not produce valid results.

concerns.description: Fidelity Structural evaluation failed — dimension not assessed, requires human review
concerns.analysis: The structural fidelity call did not produce valid results.

A significant section of text and list items from page 27 (PDF page 31) is duplicated excessively in the HTML output. The paragraph starting with 'Except as provided in 40 CFR 62.16724(d)(2)...' and the subsequent list items describing Equation 5, including its variable definitions, repeat at least seven times consecutively in the body content.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 31 of the PDF contains a single instance of the section starting: 'Except as provided in 40 CFR 62.16724(d)(2), the specified methods in paragraphs (a)(1) through (6) of this section...'
concerns.output_quote: The HTML output contains 7 back-to-back repetitions of the exact same list item block starting with 'Except as provided in 40 CFR 62.16724(d)(2)...' down through the 'Qm = 2LoR(e-kc - e-kt) (Eq. 5)' formula and variable definitions.
concerns.location: HTML body corresponding to PDF Page 31

concerns.description: Output has more images than source PDF (ratio 1.3x) — possible image duplication
concerns.analysis: image_count_ratio=1.33. More images in output than in source indicates duplicated or fabricated image elements.

concerns.description: Displaced hyperlinks: 428 link(s) extracted as standalone elements instead of inline text
concerns.analysis: standalone_links=428, examples=['mailto:massoud.eslambolchi@deq.nc.gov', 'https://www.oah.nc.gov/hearings-division/hearing-process/fil', 'https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-40/part-62/subpart-OOO']. Links should be inline within paragraphs, not separate blocks.

concerns.description: Header/footer elements retained in output (74): North Carolina Department of Environmental Quality | Divisio; Permit No. 08849T09; Page 3
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=74. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML — the renderer failed to strip it. This is a structural accessibility issue.

concerns.description: 7 bare URL(s) in text not converted to hyperlinks: https://www.oah.nc.gov/hearings-division/filing/hearing-forms.; oah.postmaster@oah.nc.gov; (https://www.epa.gov/electronic-reporting-air-emissions/compliance-and-emissions; fedreg.legal@nara.gov; www.archives.gov/federal-register/cfr/ibr-locations.html.
concerns.analysis: bare_url_count=7. URLs appear as plain text instead of clickable links.

concerns.description: List numbering restart(s): 9 ordered list(s) restart numbering at 1 instead of continuing sequence
concerns.analysis: restart_count=9. Examples: p9: heading "1. 15A NCAC 02D .0516: SULFUR DIOXIDE EM"; p9: heading "2. 15A NCAC 02D .0521: CONTROL OF VISIBL"; p9: 4 single-item ordered lists (fragmented). Ordered lists that restart numbering suggest content was split across page breaks and not reassembled.

concerns.description: Footnote(s) converted to bulleted list: 1 unordered list(s) after table(s) appear to be footnotes
concerns.analysis: footnote_as_list_count=1. Examples: 1 item(s): "This list is not intended to be a detailed record ". Table footnotes (often marked with *, †, ‡) were converted to <ul><li> elements instead of paragraphs. This changes the semantic meaning — screen readers announce them as list items rather than explanatory notes.

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 4 table(s) have a data row marked as header: "Permittee:", "AOS", "Emission Source ID No."
concerns.analysis: data_in_th=0, datarow_as_header=4. Tables use <th> for data values (misrepresenting data as headers) or have a data row mismarked as a header row. Screen readers rely on <th> to announce column/row context.

concerns.description: Links displaced to end of page: 426 link(s) clustered at bottom of 28 page(s) instead of inline in text
concerns.analysis: displaced_link_pages=28, total_displaced=426. Links appear as standalone elements at the end of pages rather than being inline in the paragraph text.

concerns.description: Page number artifacts retained: Page 2, Page 3, Page 5
Repeated footer/header text (2x): "[86 fr 27770, may 21, 2021, as amended at 87 fr 8203, feb. 1"
concerns.analysis: Short text with footer-like pattern appears on 2 pages

concerns.description: Mixed numbering types at same list level (6 list(s)): p10:letter+roman, p12:letter+roman, p13:letter+roman — possible sub-point flattening
concerns.analysis: flat_lists=6. Lists with mixed numbering types (numeric+letter or numeric+roman) at the same depth level suggest sub-points were flattened.

concerns.description: Numbered items as headings: 6 heading(s) look like numbered list items
concerns.analysis: heading_list_count=6. Headings starting with '1.', '2.' etc. suggest numbered list items were misclassified as headings during extraction.
